_doc: Mowing manifest configuration. Management rule: lots present in the uploaded PayHOA aging CSV are HOA-managed; lots not present are Hacienda (developer-managed, BLUE). Use managedLots entries below to override on a per-lot basis (e.g. force HOA management for Lot #1 + common areas) or to apply a special pricing class.

managedLots.notes: Lot #1 + common areas (priced as common-area mow when HOA-managed)
